# Static Dynamics 365

> Deterministic, zero-dependency standalone Customer Service, Sales, and Field Service tenant.

Canonical documentation: README.md
API and action reference: API.md
Explicit boundaries: LIMITATIONS.md
Security policy: SECURITY.md
Contribution rules: CONTRIBUTING.md
License: LICENSE (MIT)

Key implementation:
- site/twin-core.mjs: importable deterministic fetch-like runtime
- site/app-helpers.mjs: pure UI state, view, dashboard, relationship, and lifecycle helpers
- site/app.mjs: shared browser shell for all three apps
- data/schema.json: canonical entity, metadata, relationship, action, app, and UI declaration
- site/tenant-schema.mjs: generated authoritative runtime schema and tenant configuration
- data/source.json: compact deterministic synthetic customer source
- build.py: Python standard-library generator and validator
- site/api/data/v9.2/: read-only OData-shaped JSON fixtures
- tests/: Node built-in and Python unittest coverage

Boundary:
- Hosted JSON is read-only.
- Queries, writes, actions, faults, retries, concurrency, virtual time, reset, export, and replay
  execute only in an injected TwinCore instance.
- Data is fictional and uses .example domains, reserved 555 phone numbers, and a fixed UTC epoch.
- The runtime has no dependencies, telemetry, third-party requests, backend, or durable storage.

Primary validation:
python3 build.py --check
node --test tests/*.test.mjs
python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_*.py' -v
